title: First Signal
outcome: Earn Technology Cadet readiness by identifying the ecosystem, zones, characters, and one student-operated task.

title: Cable Trace
outcome: Trace a cable path, label both ends, and document it for a Cable Runner badge.

title: Switch Console Check
outcome: Open a console path, verify switch identity, and capture a clean validation note.

title: Template Inventory
outcome: Review proposed VM templates and prepare documentation for the image repository.

title: Ticket Simulation Draft
outcome: Write a realistic ACE Service Desk ticket for AD, password reset, network, or VM support practice.

title: Cyber Scenario Outline
outcome: Draft a safe cyber range scenario with objective, allowed actions, evidence, and debrief questions.

title: Status Board Update
outcome: Update a project card with status, blocker, waiting-on field, and next action.
